documentedControls: W/S or Up/Down: move forward or backward
A/D or Left/Right: turn left or right
Tab: toggle gameplay view and automap

observedSurfaces.name: package-winmm-dependency
observedSurfaces.summary: Workspace declares @bun-win32/winmm, an audio-adjacent WinMM binding package.

observedSurfaces.name: src-main-gameplay-window-launch
observedSurfaces.summary: Launcher creates a gameplay session and awaits runLauncherWindow without exposing live audio wiring.

observedSurfaces.name: src-main-help-text-without-audio-controls
observedSurfaces.summary: Help text documents movement, automap, and quit controls, with no sound, music, or volume controls.
